data.title: Implantica launches RefluxStop® to fill treatment gap after competitor exit in Europe and the UK, targeting 1 billion acid reflux sufferers.
data.description: A Liechtenstein-based medtech company, Implantica AG (publ.), disclosed on Sept. 25, 2025, their pioneering work in incorporating advanced technology inside the body. One standout innovation is RefluxStop®, a distinctive device developed for addressing acid reflux. This solution is targeted towards a vast market, with approximately 1 billion individuals globally experiencing issues related to acid reflux.

data.title: Clean Food Group acquires one million litre fermentation facility, accelerating commercialization process. CFG targets $20 billion market.
data.description: In London, it has been announced that the commercialization process has been expedited, placing CFG in a distinctive position to target a market valued at US$20 billion.

data.title: LG Ad Solutions introduces Social Sync powered by Spaceback in UK, converting digital/social content into CTV ads. Global availability announced post US NewFronts, making CTV advertising accessible for brands.
data.description: In London, LG Ad Solutions unveiled Social Sync, powered by Spaceback, in the UK, a new creative solution for transforming digital and social content into high-impact Connected TV (CTV) ads. This collaboration, initially revealed at NewFronts in the US, is now accessible worldwide, marking a significant advancement for brands. Connected TV's increasing accessibility for advertisers is simplifying the ad creation process, offering a seamless transition for brands to engage with audiences on a broader scale.

data.title: Half of UK doctors believe age affects their ability to practise medicine, according to a Medscape survey.
data.description: A recent report by Medscape UK Doctors and Life After Medicine in London delves into the sentiments of doctors contemplating exiting the profession. The report sheds light on the emotions and experiences of healthcare professionals considering a career change.

data.title: Dr. Shunpei Yamazaki renews GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title with 20,120 patents in semiconductor devices, displays, and analog tech.
data.description: In Atsugi, Japan on September 25, 2025, Dr. Shunpei Yamazaki from Semiconductor Energy Laboratory Co., Ltd. (SEL) has set a new GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS (TM) title for "Most patents credited as inventor" with an impressive total of 20,120 patents related to semiconductor devices, displays, and analog technologies. Dr. Yamazaki surpassed his previous record, showcasing his remarkable contribution to innovation in these fields.

data.title: GSR seeks ETF for 5 crypto funds, including 1 for crypto treasury firms, in latest move.
data.description: GSR has recently submitted applications for a total of five cryptocurrency Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs). These ETFs focus on different aspects, such as staking and bundling tokens. The primary highlight amongst these applications is a fund specifically designed to invest in cryptocurrency treasury companies.

data.title: Naver, like Google of South Korea, set to buy Upbit, nation's top crypto exchange, in move towards stablecoins.
data.description: Often referred to as the “Google of South Korea,” Naver is the leading search engine in the country. Upbit Korea stands as the largest cryptocurrency exchange in South Korea.

data.title: ENGIE partners with Kaluza to deploy Energy Intelligence Platform, benefiting 20M consumer contracts worldwide.
data.description: In a significant partnership, global energy provider ENGIE has decided to utilize Kaluza's Energy Intelligence Platform in a large-scale licensing deal. With ENGIE currently serving 20 million consumer contracts globally, this move is intended to incorporate advanced digital technologies to improve customer satisfaction and drive the transition towards more intelligent and sustainable energy solutions. After a comprehensive assessment of various technology providers, ENGIE opted for Kaluza's platform for this extended, cross-market collaboration, marking a multi-year agreement between the two firms.

data.title: Crypto token ASTER sees unprecedented 2345% weekly surge, surpassing Bitcoin and Dogecoin. Coin reached all-time high of $2.42.
data.description: The decentralized exchange token Aster (ASTER) saw a significant surge on Wednesday despite the overall weakness in the cryptocurrency market. ASTER witnessed an impressive 4% increase in the last 24 hours, hitting a record high of $2.42. Over the past week, the coin has skyrocketed by 358%, and a whopping 2345% over the month, outperforming major players like Bitcoin (BTC) and Dogecoin (DOGE). Speculative interest in ASTER spiked, with open interest in ASTER derivatives rising by 13% in the last day alone, reaching $1.20 billion, according to Coinglass. Whale interest in ASTER also witnessed growth during this period.
